intent: Drop the isJobListingEmail precheck (false-negative source); lower confidence filter 0.5->0.3 with drop logging; raise throughput (MAX_EMAILS_PER_RUN 2->10, trigger 3h->1h)
manual_step: Re-run setupJobFinderTrigger() in Apps Script editor to apply hourly interval (live trigger still 3h until then). MAX_EMAILS_PER_RUN=10 takes effect immediately.
